hero.title: I'm a Systems Developer
hero.stacks:
Main stacks: Java, SpringBoot, PHP, TypeScript, Laravel.
Creating new experiences with technology!

about.title: About Me
about.description_1: I'm a Back-End developer with a focus on Java, Spring Boot, PHP, REST APIs, and DevOps practices. I have practical experience in organizational and academic projects, always aiming to create scalable and efficient solutions. I've been studying Java for over 3 years, during which I've honed my skills in systems development, API integration, and software architecture best practices.
about.description_2: During my internship at the Regional Electoral Court of Tocantins (TRE-TO), I worked in the Infrastructure and Internal Systems Development area. I participated in the creation and maintenance of published applications that streamlined the daily work of public servants, optimizing administrative workflows.
about.description_3: I've developed and collaborated on various projects, from e-commerce systems to internal tools for the Court. I always seek to balance performance with technical quality. I believe technology is about solving real problems.

projects.title: Projects
projects.featured_intro: The highlighted projects are: Registra Sistemas and Sisma-TO
projects.registra_subtitle: Sistema de centralização de sistemas publicados (em produção/homologação)
projects.registra_description: Registra Sistemas was developed for internal use at TRE-TO. The main technologies used were PHP and Laravel. The system's purpose is to centralize control of applications in production, homologation, and development, facilitating management and monitoring of institutional systems.
projects.sisma_subtitle: Sistema de monitoramento da água e saneamento do Tocantins
projects.sisma_description: 2nd place winner at the UNITINS Hackathon (2025), Sisma-TO (Tocantins Water Monitoring and Governance System) is a platform for governmental use regarding water quality and sanitation in Tocantins. The system is based on real data in collaboration with SISAGUA and SNIS, aiming for greater monitoring with a focus on data, transparency, and support for public policies.
projects.ecommerceemjavacomquarkus_description: Advanced e-commerce example in Java using Postgres, with Quarkus
projects.apidegestaoresidencialinviteusconvites_d: API for managing residential invites, such as access to condominiums and apartments.
